description: Very good experience, easy to use and to understand.
author: Enio K.
pros: Risk Management, Artificial Intelligence Engine, Compliance Management
cons: DOes not have brazilian portuguese language

description: Overall, our experience has been amazing! Cynomi is SO easy to work with, everyone is super friendly and very helpful. And I think one of the most important things is that they are very responsive to feedback and changing/adding to the platform regularly.
author: Shawn W.
pros: We like that it's a clean interface and it's simple to use. We have had many mid-sized customers comment how much they like using it.
cons: We would like to see more frameworks for US Water and Wastewater compliance.

review_title: Great product to manage cybersecurity compliance and manage risk!
description: We have been using it for 6 months and really like the value it provides without breaking the bank for our smaller customers.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Cynomi is a great product to manage risk and compliance for SME companies. It combines the ability to manage policies against many compliance standards and regulations. It allows us to assign priorities to the tasks needed to fulfill a policy requirement. The user interface is very clean and easy to understand.
cons: There are a few features that are on the roadmap that I wish were available now.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Steve B.
pros: Cynomi is very easy to use and has a lot of functionality
cons: I wish it had more dynamic integration capabilities

author: Brent F.
pros: The best part about Cynomi is the visualization and cleanness of the platform - it provides the necessary visualizations that matter to Leadership and the Board that make sense to them. The other component that is as equal in value is the questionnaires and how they are approached.
cons: Within the questionnaires, there are some areas that need a bit more "clarification", specifically within the On-Premise/Hosted Servers and Active Directory - either provide some additional context or links to Microsoft documentation to help elaborate on the ask.

description: Overall, we have had a fantastic experience with Cynomi. The platform performs great, and everyone has been easy to work with.
author: Chad R.
pros: Cynomi is quick to deploy, and the user interface makes it easy for clients to understand. Reporting is easy and helps drive client conversations.
cons: Additional frameworks and integrations would be helpful.

review_title: A great product in a vCISO's tool bag
description: Adding Cynomi's vCISO product has helped us better structure how we provide and manage this new service offering to our end customers.
author: Roger C.
pros: As we were looking to add vCISO as one of our service offerings Cynomi demonstrated high value with their product, easing the ongoing review process for a customer's environment and policies and procedures.
cons: We look forward to future improvements to the on-prem scanning probe deployment as well as deeper integration with SaaS products that most of our customers use, such as Microsoft 365.
author_profession: Director of Compliance and Business Development
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Outstanding thus far. Great customer service, lots of quickly released features and enhancements, and a vendor who listens to their partners to help constantly improve the product.
author: Jerry C.
pros: The ability to quickly deploy a solution that can 1) reduce the time needed to perform work, and 2) increase profitability.
cons: None at this time. This field requires a minimum number of characters, so adding this to pad the field.

review_title: Great addition to your CISO tool kit!
author: Scott S.
pros: The large coverage of compliance standards. The ability to integrate client personnel and service providers into compliance monitoring.
cons: Lacks AI assistance to help package project deliverables.
